summary: Tamperproof Web Immutable Secure Transaction (TWIST) introduces a new RPC method to be implemented by wallets, `wallet_signedRequest`, that enables dapps to interact with wallets in a tamperproof manner via "signed requests". The dapp associates a public key with its DNS record and uses the corresponding private key to sign payloads sent to the wallet via `wallet_signedRequest`. Wallets can then use the public key in the DNS record to validate the integrity of the payload.
title: Tamperproof Extension Wallets API (TWIST)
